Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 15/11/2025
The market witnessed a slight pickup at the very end of the week, but overall conditions remain largely unchanged due to the strengthened U.S. Source: Best Oasis Limited

INDIA
The market witnessed a slight pickup at the very end of the week, but overall
conditions remain largely unchanged due to the strengthened U.S. dollar, which
continues to limit market movement.
